generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst, I've seen firsthand how outdated security laws leave us vulnerable. The 2024 London attacks exposed critical gaps in our domestic security framework. We need expanded powers to preempt threats before they materialize. Trust me, the current system isn't keeping up with evolving dangers. #NationalSecurityFirst #UpdateOurLaws
